name: visit
_note: sub_worlds.visit records a visit (increments visits + unique visitor set) on an existing, non-archived, non-private world and returns the world-travel hand-off contract (travel.destination_world_id). Archived ⇒ ok:false 'world is archived'; private without edit rights ⇒ ok:false 'world is private'; unknown ⇒ ok:false 'world not found'. The assassin drives with no live world, so ok:false is correct (not no_db). Live STATE + actor — never no_db.
